violations: [PIPL] Required field 'full_name' was not found in masked fields. Ensure this field is present and masked.
recommendations: PIPL: Prepare CAC security assessment filing if volume > 100k records or sensitive data.
Generate declaration template for recipient country safeguards.
cross_border_paths: 签署标准合同 (Standard Contract / SCCs)
notes: PIPL 是中国最严格的个人信息保护法。- 敏感个人信息需单独同意 + 更高保护措施- 重要数据 / 大规模个人信息出境必须进行安全评估- 默认禁止直接跨境传输，需满足三种合法路径之一- 建议生成安全评估申报材料辅助文档
